title: Avoid implicit string and byte concatenations
description: Avoid implicit string and byte concatenations because it can lead to unexpected results.
message: Implicit concatenation of bytes and strings should be avoided.
recommendation: Use explicit concatenation or type casting.
why_is_this_an_issue: Implicit string and byte concatenation can lead to unexpected results.
how_to_fix: Use explicit concatenation or type casting.
